description: linode_image_sharegroup_token_image_list envelope: count and the full proto Image elements under the images key. Go previously emitted a FormatListResponse of raw structs and Python over-wrapped {message,count,images,page,...}; the proto envelope is the fix. This token-scoped list paginates and never echoes a filter.

images.label: token-visible-image
images.description: Image visible through a share group token
